---
title: 'Developing Data Products: Leaflet Map'
author: "Chris Luchterhand"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Leaflet Map: Random Wisconsin Locations
This map marks 5 randomly selected locations in Wisconsin:

```{r map, echo=TRUE}
library(leaflet)

df <- data.frame(lat = runif(5, min=42.5, max=45.0),
                 lng = runif(5, min=-91.0, max=-88.0))

df %>%
  leaflet() %>%
  addTiles () %>%
  addMarkers()
```
